text: Blessed<S>835</S> is the man<S>376</S> that walketh<S>1980</S> not in the counsel<S>6098</S> of the wicked<S>7563</S>, Nor standeth<S>5975</S> in the way<S>1870</S> of sinners<S>2400</S>, Nor sitteth<S>3427</S> in the seat<S>4186</S> of scoffers<S>3887</S>:
